---
title: "Airway RNA-seq: QC Summary"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(jsonlite)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(fastqcr)
```

```{r load}
srr <- read.table("../metadata/samples.txt", header = FALSE)[[1]]

# fastp QC
fastp <- lapply(setNames(srr, srr), function(s) {
    fromJSON(file.path("../data/fastq-trimmed", paste0(s, ".json")))
})

# Salmon mapping stats
salmon <- lapply(setNames(srr, srr), function(s) {
    fromJSON(file.path("../data/quants", s, "aux_info/meta_info.json"))
})
```

## FastQC

```{r fastqc, message=FALSE}
qc_raw     <- qc_aggregate("../data/fastq/",         progressbar = FALSE)
qc_trimmed <- qc_aggregate("../data/fastq-trimmed/", progressbar = FALSE)

qc_raw$stage     <- "raw"
qc_trimmed$stage <- "trimmed"
qc_all <- bind_rows(qc_raw, qc_trimmed) |>
    mutate(stage = factor(stage, levels = c("raw", "trimmed")))

# Create sample names for paired-end reads
srr_paired <- as.vector(outer(srr, c("_1", "_2"), paste0))
```

```{r fastqc-plot}
ggplot(qc_all, aes(x = sample, y = pct.gc, fill = stage)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    labs(y = "% GC", title = "GC content before and after trimming") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r fastqc-status}
# 1. Assign the problem summaries to objects
problems_raw     <- qc_problems(qc_raw)
problems_trimmed <- qc_problems(qc_trimmed)

# 2. Join them by 'sample'
problems_joined <- full_join(
    problems_raw, 
    problems_trimmed, 
    by = "sample", 
    suffix = c("_raw", "_trimmed") # Adds these tags to the column names
  )

# 3. Create a single, unified table
problems_joined |>
  knitr::kable(caption = "FastQC problems: Raw vs Trimmed")
```

```{r fastqc-base-quality, message=FALSE}
zip_trimmed <- list.files("../data/fastq-trimmed", pattern = "_fastqc.zip$",
                          full.names = TRUE)

pbq_df <- bind_rows(lapply(zip_trimmed, function(f) {
    nm <- sub("_fastqc.zip$", "", basename(f))
    qc_read(f)$per_base_sequence_quality |>
        mutate(
            sample = sub("_(1|2)$", "", nm),
            read   = sub(".*_(\\d+)$", "R\\1", nm),
            pos    = as.numeric(sub("-.*", "", Base))
        )
}))

ggplot(pbq_df, aes(x = pos, y = sample, fill = Mean)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
        colours = c("red", "orange", "grey20"),
        values  = scales::rescale(c(20, 28, 41)),
        limits  = c(20, 41),
        oob     = scales::squish
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~read, ncol = 1) +
    labs(x = "Position (bp)", y = NULL, fill = "Mean Q",
         title = "Per-base mean quality (trimmed reads)") +
    theme_bw()
```

```{r fastqc-length, message=FALSE}
len_df <- bind_rows(lapply(zip_trimmed, function(f) {
    nm <- sub("_fastqc.zip$", "", basename(f))
    qc_read(f)$sequence_length_distribution |>
        mutate(
            sample = sub("_(1|2)$", "", nm),
            read   = sub(".*_(\\d+)$", "R\\1", nm),
            Length = as.numeric(sub("-.*", "", Length))
        )
}))

ggplot(len_df, aes(x = Length, y = Count / 1e6, colour = sample, linetype = read)) +
    geom_line() +
    labs(x = "Read length (bp)", y = "Count (millions)", colour = "Sample", linetype = "Read",
         title = "Sequence length distribution (trimmed reads)") +
    theme_bw()
```

## Trimming (fastp)

```{r fastp-table}
fastp_df <- bind_rows(lapply(srr, function(s) {
    bf <- fastp[[s]]$summary$before_filtering
    af <- fastp[[s]]$summary$after_filtering
    fr <- fastp[[s]]$filtering_result
    data.frame(
        SRR            = s,
        reads_in       = bf$total_reads,
        reads_out      = af$total_reads,
        pct_kept       = round(af$total_reads / bf$total_reads * 100, 1),
        q30_before     = round(bf$q30_rate * 100, 1),
        q30_after      = round(af$q30_rate * 100, 1)
    )
}))

knitr::kable(fastp_df,
    col.names = c("SRR", "Reads in", "Reads out", "% kept", "Q30 before (%)", "Q30 after (%)"),
    format.args = list(big.mark = ","))
```

```{r fastp-plot}
ggplot(fastp_df, aes(x = SRR)) +
    geom_col(aes(y = reads_in / 1e6, fill = "Before"), alpha = 0.4, position = "identity") +
    geom_col(aes(y = reads_out / 1e6, fill = "After"), position = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(Before = "steelblue", After = "steelblue")) +
    labs(y = "Read pairs (millions)", title = "Reads before and after trimming") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r fastp-q30-plot}
fastp_df |>
    select(SRR, q30_before, q30_after) |>
    pivot_longer(-SRR, names_to = "stage", values_to = "q30") |>
    mutate(stage = factor(sub("q30_", "", stage), levels = c("before", "after"))) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = SRR, y = q30, fill = stage)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 80, linetype = "dashed", colour = "red") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(before = "steelblue", after = "tomato")) +
    ylim(0, 100) +
    labs(y = "Q30 rate (%)", fill = "Stage", title = "Q30 rate before and after trimming") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## Duplication & Filtering

```{r fastp-dup}
fastp_dup_df <- bind_rows(lapply(srr, function(s) {
    data.frame(
        SRR      = s,
        dup_rate = round(fastp[[s]]$duplication$rate * 100, 1),
        ins_peak = fastp[[s]]$insert_size$peak
    )
}))

knitr::kable(fastp_dup_df,
    col.names = c("SRR", "Duplication rate (%)", "Insert size peak (bp)"),
    caption   = "Duplication rate and insert size peak (fastp)")
```

```{r fastp-dup-plot}
ggplot(fastp_dup_df, aes(x = SRR, y = dup_rate)) +
    geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 30, linetype = "dashed", colour = "red") +
    ylim(0, 100) +
    labs(y = "Duplication rate (%)", title = "Read duplication rate (fastp)") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r fastp-filter-breakdown}
bind_rows(lapply(srr, function(s) {
    fr <- fastp[[s]]$filtering_result
    data.frame(
        SRR       = s,
        Passed    = fr$passed_filter_reads,
        Low_Q     = fr$low_quality_reads,
        Too_Short = fr$too_short_reads,
        Many_N    = fr$too_many_N_reads
    )
})) |>
    pivot_longer(-SRR, names_to = "category", values_to = "reads") |>
    mutate(category = factor(category,
           levels = c("Passed", "Low_Q", "Too_Short", "Many_N"))) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = SRR, y = reads / 1e6, fill = category)) +
    geom_col() +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(Passed = "seagreen", Low_Q = "tomato",
                   Too_Short = "orange", Many_N = "mediumpurple"),
        labels = c(Passed = "Passed", Low_Q = "Low quality",
                   Too_Short = "Too short", Many_N = "Too many N")) +
    labs(y = "Reads (millions)", fill = "Category",
         title = "Read filtering breakdown (fastp)") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## Salmon Mapping Rate

```{r salmon-table}
salmon_df <- bind_rows(lapply(srr, function(s) {
    m <- salmon[[s]]
    data.frame(
        SRR            = s,
        reads_in       = m$num_processed,
        reads_mapped   = m$num_mapped,
        pct_mapped     = round(m$percent_mapped, 1),
        frag_len_mean  = round(m$frag_length_mean, 0),
        frag_len_sd    = round(m$frag_length_sd, 0)
    )
}))

knitr::kable(salmon_df,
    col.names = c("SRR", "Reads processed", "Reads mapped", "% mapped",
                  "Mean frag len", "SD frag len"),
    format.args = list(big.mark = ","))
```

```{r salmon-plot}
ggplot(salmon_df, aes(x = SRR, y = pct_mapped)) +
    geom_col(fill = "seagreen") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 80, linetype = "dashed", colour = "red") +
    ylim(0, 100) +
    labs(y = "% mapped", title = "Salmon mapping rate") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r salmon-filter-detail}
# Breakdown of why fragments were not counted as mapped
bind_rows(lapply(srr, function(s) {
    m <- salmon[[s]]
    total <- m$num_processed
    data.frame(
        SRR           = s,
        Mapped        = m$num_mapped,
        Decoy         = m$num_decoy_fragments,
        Dovetail      = m$num_dovetail_fragments,
        Below_Thresh  = m$num_fragments_filtered_vm
    )
})) |>
    pivot_longer(-SRR, names_to = "category", values_to = "fragments") |>
    mutate(category = factor(category,
           levels = c("Mapped", "Below_Thresh", "Dovetail", "Decoy"))) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = SRR, y = fragments / 1e6, fill = category)) +
    geom_col() +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(Mapped = "seagreen", Below_Thresh = "tomato",
                   Dovetail = "orange", Decoy = "mediumpurple"),
        labels = c(Mapped = "Mapped", Below_Thresh = "Below threshold",
                   Dovetail = "Dovetail", Decoy = "Decoy hit")) +
    labs(y = "Fragments (millions)", fill = "Category",
         title = "Salmon fragment disposition") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## QC Summary

```{r qc-summary}
flag <- function(x, pass_if) ifelse(pass_if, "PASS", "WARN")

qc_summary <- data.frame(
    SRR        = fastp_df$SRR,
    pct_kept   = fastp_df$pct_kept,
    q30_after  = fastp_df$q30_after,
    dup_rate   = fastp_dup_df$dup_rate,
    pct_mapped = salmon_df$pct_mapped
) |>
    mutate(
        flag_trimming = flag(pct_kept,   pct_kept   >= 80),
        flag_q30      = flag(q30_after,  q30_after  >= 80),
        flag_dup      = flag(dup_rate,   dup_rate   <= 30),
        flag_mapping  = flag(pct_mapped, pct_mapped >= 75)
    )

knitr::kable(qc_summary,
    col.names = c("SRR", "% Kept", "Q30 After (%)", "Dup Rate (%)", "% Mapped",
                  "Trimming", "Q30", "Duplication", "Mapping"),
    caption = "QC summary — thresholds: kept ≥ 80%, Q30 ≥ 80%, dup ≤ 30%, mapped ≥ 75%")
```
